short_summary: War ongoing; Iran deal diverts US focus
rationale: Active war continues at maximum background level; US-Iran deal negotiations persist as a distraction from Western support for Ukraine, with Israel's Beirut strikes adding to regional instability.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal close to signing — Washington and Tehran in final stages
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal would further divert American diplomatic and military attention away from Ukraine, potentially weakening the pressure on Russia and reducing urgency of Western aid packages.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Beirut; Hezbollah ceasefire violation alleged
top_events.summary: Multi-front Middle East escalation further stretches US and Western attention and resources, indirectly reducing bandwidth for Ukraine support.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: Tightening enforcement of Russian oil sanctions could squeeze Kremlin revenues, offering a modest indirect benefit to Ukraine's war effort.
